recommendations.title: Source Code
recommendations.overview: When decorated soldier Captain Colter Stevens wakes up in the body of an unknown man, he discovers he's part of a mission to find the bomber of a Chicago commuter train.

recommendations.title: Moon
recommendations.overview: With only three weeks left in his three-year contract, Sam Bell is eager to return to Earth. Stationed alone at a Moon-based facility with his computer assistant GERTY, an unexpected accident sets off a series of unsettling events that shake his isol

recommendations.title: Warcraft
recommendations.overview: The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilization faces a fearsome race of invaders: orc warriors fleeing their dying home to colonize another. As a portal opens to connect the two worlds, one army faces destruction and the

recommendations.title: Sound of My Voice
recommendations.overview: A journalist and his girlfriend get pulled in while they investigate a cult whose leader claims to be from the future.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Zone 414
recommendations.overview: In the near future on a colony of state-of-the-art robots, a private investigator is hired by the colony's creator to bring his missing daughter home.

recommendations.title: Breathe
recommendations.overview: Air-supply is scarce in the near future, forcing a mother and daughter to fight for survival when two strangers arrive desperate for an oxygenated haven.

recommendations.title: The Hidden Face
recommendations.overview: A Spanish orchestra conductor deals with the mysterious disappearance of his girlfriend.
